# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in aegis-scan, please report it responsibly.

**Do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Instead, email: security@z8run.org

We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and provide a timeline for a fix.

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---|---|
| Latest release | Yes |
| Older versions | No |
